per_question.answer: It is anonymised. However, the 36-month anonymisation rule is not applied to customers with financial records, which are subject to a 7-year regulatory retention that overrides the shorter policy.
Jaro-Winkler similarity with a threshold of 0.92.
The order status flow is draft → submitted → processing → shipped → delivered. Terminal states include cancelled and returned.
The order is automatically put on hold and an alert is generated.

per_question.expected: Real-time via warehouse API (webhook + 5min poll fallback)
per_question.answer: Inventory is synced in real-time from a warehouse API, using a webhook with a 5-minute poll as a fallback.

per_question.expected: Yes - CUSTOMER says 36 months for churned, regulatory requires 7 years for financial records
per_question.answer: Yes, there is a known conflict between the customer retention policy (36 months for churned customers) and the regulatory requirement to retain financial records for 7 years. The 7-year regulatory retention overrides the shorter policy.
The email field is never null for active customers.

per_question.expected: Stored in UTC, displayed in customer locale
per_question.answer: Timestamps are stored in UTC and displayed in the customer's local time zone.
Addresses are normalised using the SmartyStreets API and formatted according to the USPS format.
A minimum of 7 years, per regulatory requirements.

per_question.expected: auto-deactivated, reactivation requires manual review by merchandising
per_question.answer: Products with a 'seasonal' catalog status are automatically deactivated at the end of the season. Reactivation requires manual review by the merchandising team.

per_question.expected: No, order_id is mandatory (PAYMENT belongs to ORDER)
per_question.answer: No. The PAYMENT entity has a mandatory `order_id` field, as indicated by `BELONGS-TO:@ENTITY-ORDER(order_id,mandatory)`.
